tasks.name: Walk-in patient form (Khách vãng lai) — Fix/improve the form
tasks.description: Current form only has Name, Phone, Doctor, Service. Needs to be improved for 30-second check-in workflow.
tasks.evidence: Tested via WalkInForm.test.tsx: all 7 fields render (name, phone, gender, birthyear, doctor, service, note). Submission correctly passes gender="male", birthyear=1990, comment="Đau răng" to createPartner and appends note to appointment.
tasks.verification: Open the walk-in form, confirm all required fields are present, submit with test data, verify it saves correctly

tasks.name: Appointment form — Add [+] button to add new customers inline
tasks.description: On Tạo lịch hẹn form, add [+] button next to Khách hàng field for inline customer creation without navigating away.
tasks.evidence: Tested via AppointmentForm.test.tsx: [+] button with title "Thêm khách hàng mới" renders next to CustomerSelector. Clicking it opens the inline AddCustomerForm modal (data-testid="add-customer-form"). The form already had onCreateNew wiring and modal; only added visible [+] button.
tasks.verification: Open appointment form, click [+] next to customer field, verify inline modal appears, create a test customer, verify it appears in the dropdown

tasks.name: Overview page — Add 3 quick search boxes
tasks.description: Add search boxes to: patient reception area, services/activity table, right sidebar (today's appointments). Clinic has 100-200 appointments/day.
tasks.evidence: Added quick search inputs to PatientCheckIn (zone1), TodayServicesTable (zone2), and TodayAppointments (zone3). Verified via Overview.test.tsx that 3 search boxes render, and via useOverviewAppointments.test.tsx that search filtering by name/phone/doctor/note works correctly for zone1 and zone3.
tasks.verification: Open overview page, verify 3 search boxes exist in correct locations, type a search query in each, verify filtering works

tasks.name: Overview page — Auto-scroll to completed section on status change
tasks.description: When changing patient status to Hoàn thành, view should auto-scroll down to show the completed card.
tasks.evidence: Added useEffect in PatientCard that calls cardRef.current.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth", block: "center" }) whenever currentStatus changes to "done". Verified via PatientCheckIn.test.tsx that scrollIntoView is invoked with correct arguments on status change.
tasks.verification: Change a patient status to Hoàn thành, verify the page automatically scrolls to show the completed card in the lower section

tasks.name: Staff picker — Filter by role/position
tasks.description: Staff dropdown should filter by job role. Selecting Bác sĩ should show only doctors (10), not all 30 staff.
tasks.evidence: Created DoctorSelector.test.tsx verifying filterRoles={['doctor']} shows only doctors, filterRoles={['assistant']} shows only assistants, and omitting the prop shows all. All 3 tests pass. Existing DoctorSelector component already supported role filtering via DB query; no source changes needed.
tasks.verification: Open staff picker, select Bác sĩ role, verify only doctors appear. Select Trợ thủ, verify only assistants appear. Confirm no cross-role leakage.

tasks.name: Customer Profile — Split bill into 3 columns
tasks.description: Payment section needs 3 separate columns: total amount, amount paid, amount still owed.
tasks.evidence: Added a 3-column grid in CustomerProfile payment tab displaying Tổng chi phí, Đã thanh toán, Còn nợ using computed totalServiceCost and amountPaid. Verified via CustomerProfile.test.tsx that values format correctly (3.500.000 ₫, 2.500.000 ₫, 1.000.000 ₫). Frontend compiles with no TS errors.
tasks.verification: Open a customer profile with payment history, verify 3 columns visible: total, paid, remaining. Verify math is correct.

tasks.name: Customer Profile — Fix deposit/payment section
tasks.description: Payment allocation not updating after deposit/payment entries. Shows mismatch: allocated 3,000,000 but total payment 2,000,000 (1,000,000 discrepancy).
tasks.evidence: Fixed API field-name mismatch in mapAllocations (invoiceId/invoiceName/etc.), added residual decrement on payment creation and restoration on void in payments.js, fixed customerBalance.js deposit query (bank_transfer + deposit_used), and wired PaymentForm default props for editing (defaultDepositAmount, defaultCashAmount, defaultBankAmount, defaultAllocations). CustomerProfile now shows a 'Tổng phân bổ' total line in expanded payments. Verified via CustomerProfile.test.tsx (5 tests pass) and TypeScript compiles cleanly.
tasks.verification: Add a deposit, add payment entries, verify the payment section updates correctly. Verify allocated amount matches total payment with no discrepancy.
